claim.observation: Trusted SRUM window summary records exported SRUM IdMap, network, and connectivity tables. The network table has 4 rows globally and 2 rows in the 2018-05-13T10:05Z..10:15Z target window; both target-window rows are WINLOGON.EXE/SPOOLER_SERVICE with sent=0 and received=0. Selected cloud/browser executable classes Chrome, OneDrive, Dropbox, DropboxUpdate, iCloudDrive, iCloudServices, GoogleUpdate, GoogleDriveFS, GoogleDrive, and Explorer all have zero SRUM network rows in the target window. The connectivity table has zero target-window rows.
claim.interpretation: This is an exported-SRUM aggregate network/connectivity boundary only. It does not prove no network activity elsewhere and does not identify a file, transfer direction, completed upload, or human operator.
